# epic-creator

Decompose RHAISTRAT strategies into implementation epic DAGs with adversarial review. Fetches strategies from Jira, builds component graphs from architecture context, generates per-epic files with AI implementability scoring, and runs review/revise cycles.

!!! info "Plugin Details"

    - **Version**: 1.0.0
    - **Author**: Jessica Forrester
    - **Category**: [Product Planning](../../categories/planning.md)
    - **Repository**: [opendatahub-io/epic-creator](https://github.com/opendatahub-io/epic-creator)
    - **Tags**: <span class="tag-pill">epic</span> <span class="tag-pill">jira</span> <span class="tag-pill">decomposition</span> <span class="tag-pill">rhaistrat</span> <span class="tag-pill">dag</span> <span class="tag-pill">strategy</span>

## Skills

| Skill | Description | Invocable |
|-------|-------------|-----------|
| [`/epic-decompose`](epic-decompose.md) | Decompose batches of RHAISTRAT strategies into implementation epic DAGs | :material-check: |

## Installation

```bash
/plugin install epic-creator@opendatahub-skills
```
